name: Lisbon

palette.name: Limestone Cream
palette.rationale: Warm limestone facades and sunlit paved squares are common in central neighborhoods.

palette.name: Azulejo Blue
palette.rationale: Blue-and-white azulejo tile traditions strongly influence Lisbon's visual identity.

palette.name: Tram Red
palette.rationale: A high-contrast accent used editorially to represent transport energy and movement.

sources.title: Lisboa em Números
sources.note: Used for city background and demographic context.

sources.title: Azulejos in Lisbon
sources.note: Used to support interpretation of tile-driven color identity.

notes: Initial draft record for data model validation.
editorialSummary: Lisbon's palette combines stone warmth, Atlantic blues, and selective modern accents to balance factual material culture with editorial interpretation.
